# Kogvio

## Understand anything online without leaving the page.

## Understand anything online without leaving the page.

20 followers

Visit website

AI Chatbots

•

Chrome Extensions

Every time I didn't understand something online, I had the same workflow: Copy. Open ChatGPT. Paste. Come back. It completely broke my focus. So I built Kogvio. Highlight anything on a webpage or PDF, ask questions instantly in context, and continue learning without leaving the page. Whether it's documentation, research papers, medical textbooks, or technical diagrams, Kogvio helps you understand—not just search.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

Free Options [...] Hey Product Hunt! I'm Harshit, the solo founder behind Kogvio. The idea came from something I was doing dozens of times every day. I'd be reading documentation, research papers, medical textbooks, or technical articles, and every time I got stuck, my workflow looked like this: • Copy the text • Open ChatGPT • Paste it • Wait for an answer • Go back to where I was reading It completely broke my focus. So I started wondering... Why can't AI live where I'm already learning? That's why I built Kogvio. Now I can simply highlight anything on a webpage or PDF, ask questions instantly, generate mnemonics, simplify difficult concepts, or dive deeper without ever leaving the page. Over the past few months I've been refining Kogvio based on real usage, and today I'm excited to finally share it with [...] real usage, and today I'm excited to finally share it with everyone. I'd genuinely love your feedback.

results.title: Kogvio Review - AI Tool Features and Tips
results.content:
AI Tool Archive Logo

# Kogvio Review

Ever wish you had a super-powered brain that could instantly parse any complex information you encounter online? Meet Kogvio, the revolutionary Chrome extension designed to help you understand anything online without leaving the page and study faster.

Kogvio Review

Kogvio brings intelligent on-screen analysis directly to your browser. Highlight any screen, and instantly grasp complex diagrams, advanced mathematics, and dense technical documentation through its seamless overlay. It’s an essential tool for maintaining deep focus, allowing you to decode intricate concepts without ever switching tabs.

Have an AI Tool? Get Reviewed. Submit your tool and we publish a full review!

## Main Features

## Main Target [...] ## Main Features

## Main Target

Kogvio is meticulously crafted for anyone who regularly grapples with complex information online, including:

It’s cross-platform compatible with Chrome, Brave, and Edge, and boasts an incredibly robust vision model for even the worst handwriting.

| Plan | Key Benefits |
 --- |
| Starter | ₹0/mo: 5 AI Scans per day, Standard reasoning model, Cross-platform support. |
| Kogvio Pro | ₹199/mo: Unlimited AI Scans, Advanced Vision Engine, Unlimited Chat History. |

No API keys are required; just log in and start scanning. Upgrade securely with all major payment methods.

## Top Alternatives to Kogvio [...] ## Top Alternatives to Kogvio

Let’s explore and discover the best alternatives and similar tools to Kogvio, carefully selected and ranked based on functionality, reliability, and user experience.

results.title: RTÉ says it's striving to improve Player amid complaints about 'frustrating' and 'ridiculous' service
results.content:
“We have found the ISL interpretation of many RTÉ programmes to be really great in the past, and it is one of the only means in which we can watch them. Recently, the ISL functionality has broken on the RTÉ Player, and we cannot now access any of the ISL programmes.”

The viewer asked that the issue be addressed as a priority.

“There are many users of ISL in Ireland, and we are now not able to watch any programmes from RTÉ which is hugely disappointing during these times,” they wrote.

When asked about the issues raised by viewers, a spokesperson for RTÉ said the Player has a support team “that works 365 days a year and logs all feedback on the service”.

“These issues are then escalated to our technical teams,” they added. [...] FactCheck Temperature Check Inside the Newsroom The Journal Investigates

RTÉ

# RTÉ says it's striving to improve Player amid complaints about 'frustrating' and 'ridiculous' service

“To say this is frustrating would be a gross understatement,” one viewer wrote.

5.00pm, 25 Dec 2020

67.9k

82

Share options

Copy link

Email  Facebook  X [...] “I have a good internet connection and I never have any issues with any other streaming service.

“To say this is frustrating would be a gross understatement. I have always paid my licence fee on time. I hardly ever watch anything on RTÉ and it makes me very angry that the few shows I do want to watch are completely unwatchable for me.”

On 5 September, a viewer said the quality of the RTÉ Player, when compared to other streaming services, makes “Ireland look like we are in the dark ages”.

ISL issues

On 19 October, one person raised concerns about the Irish Sign language (ISL) function not working on the Player.

They wrote: “My family and I are users of the Irish Sign Language, this being the first and only language of some of my family.
